call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright. Sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Gruffly) Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We believe this card could be beneficial, offering rewards and a low introductory rate. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 19.99% after the introductory period. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Sir, I understand your concern. But our card offers… 
Robert: No, no, no. I don't need to hear it. You've called me twice already. Take me off your list! 
Agent: Sir, I can certainly… 
Robert: (Interrupting) Just do it! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from our partner, GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, my coworker told me about you guys. I'm thinking about a kitchen remodel. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. The monthly payments would be around $290 for 60 months. 
Jessica: That sounds pretty good. I've been looking at a few options. What's your APR compared to, like, Bank of America? 
Agent: That's a great question! Bank of America's rates are currently averaging around 8.2%, and their fees are significantly higher. We offer a low origination fee of $150, and no annual fees. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What about prepayment penalties? 
Agent: None whatsoever. You can pay it off early without any extra charges. We want to make this as flexible as possible for you. 
Jessica: Alright. I need to think about it a little more. Can you send me some information via email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send over a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and a comparison chart with other lenders.

Agent: Hello Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, I was just checking out the rewards program. 
Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 16.99%. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases and a $100 sign-up bonus. 
Michael: 16.99% is a little high, isn't it? I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: It's competitive for someone with your credit profile, sir. However, after six months of on-time payments, you may be eligible for a rate reduction. 
Michael: Hmm. I'll think about it. I'm not sure if it's the right fit for me right now. 
Agent: Okay, no problem. Would you like me to send you some more information about the card's benefits? 
Michael: Sure, that would be great. Thanks. 
Agent: You're welcome! Have a great day.

Agent: Hello Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special loan program… 
Patricia: (Interrupting, loudly) Are you kidding me?! You people have called me three times this week! I told you I'm not interested! I'm unemployed! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the repeated calls. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%… 
Patricia: 24.99?! You're trying to take advantage of me! This is ridiculous! I'm reporting you to the Better Business Bureau! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Patricia: (Screaming) Get off my phone! (Click)
